{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Nexus
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Nexus]] is a location that [[Kai]] can open.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16">''City of Light'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
